zh.Moustier-Ventadour,19145,Corrèze,Nouvell: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾
法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne於大約1220年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾時，她的父親Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE32歲，母親Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT24歲。她於大約1236年與Ebles VI de VENTADOUR結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1266年在她的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.Moustier-Ventadour,19145,Corrèze,Nouvell: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾
法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne于大约1220年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾时，她的父亲Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE32岁，母亲Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT24岁。她于大约1236年与Ebles VI de VENTADOUR结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1266年在她的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Delphine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: , from Latin Delphina ‘woman from Delphi’. The Blessed Delphina ( 1283–1358 ) was a Provençal nun, who was probably named in honour of the 4th-century St Delphinus of Bordeaux. In modern times the name may sometimes be chosen for its association with the delphinium flower.

en.lifeSummary: When Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne was born about 1220, in Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, was 32 and her mother, Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT, was 24. She married Ebles VI de VENTADOUR about 1236. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1266, in her hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne est née environ 1220, à Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Ebles VI de VENTADOUR environ 1236. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1266, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne um 1220 in Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE 32 und ihre Mutter Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT 24. Sie hat um 1236 Ebles VI de VENTADOUR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1266 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne è nata il circa 1220 nel Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Ebles VI de VENTADOUR circa 1236. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1266, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Moustier-Ventadour,19145,Corrèze,Nouvell: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズモウスティエル-ベンタドウル
フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズモウスティエル-ベンタドウル
ja.lifeSummary: Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergneが約1220年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズモウスティエル-ベンタドウルで生まれた時，父Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNEは32歳，母Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORTは24歳であった。約1236年にEbles VI de VENTADOURと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1266年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne(이)가 대략 1220년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 모우스티-븐타다어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1236년 Ebles VI de VENTADOUR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1220–ABT 1266: tany ho any amin'ny 1220–tany ho any amin'ny 1266

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Ebles VI de VENTADOUR aproximadamente 1236. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1266, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne родилась около 1220 г. в местности мустиир-вентадоур, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ebles VI de VENTADOUR около 1236 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1266 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

sm.ABT 1220–ABT 1266: e tusa o le 1220–e tusa o le 1266

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Delphine de La Tour-d'Auvergne nació aproximadamente 1220, en Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Ebles VI de VENTADOUR aproximadamente 1236. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1266, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
